Class HistoryquoteLegacyResource

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<HistoryquoteLegacy>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<HistoryquoteLegacy>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateResource<HistoryquoteLegacy>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<HistoryquoteLegacy>
grafioschtrader.rest.HistoryquoteResourceBase<HistoryquoteLegacy>
grafioschtrader.rest.HistoryquoteLegacyResource
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/historyquotelegacy") public class HistoryquoteLegacyResource extends HistoryquoteResourceBase<HistoryquoteLegacy>
REST controller for the historyquote_legacy shadow archive. Individual rows can be edited (PUT, via the propose-change flow inherited from HistoryquoteResourceBase) and deleted, but not created one-by-one — rows arrive only through automatic connector-change archiving and CSV import. The bulk archive operations (list, forgotten split, delete-all, CSV import) live here too.

    • isImmutableCreateType

      protected boolean isImmutableCreateType(HistoryquoteLegacy entity)
      Description copied from class: HistoryquoteResourceBase
      Whether the given row's creation type forbids manual editing/deletion. The live table forbids editing CALCULATED rows; the archive has no such restriction.
      Specified by:
      isImmutableCreateType in class HistoryquoteResourceBase<HistoryquoteLegacy>
      Parameters:
      entity - the quote row to test
      Returns:
      true if the row must not be edited or deleted
